case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-87 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ PRIORITY CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.2743/2024 (Urgent). 2. For order on office objection. 3. For hearing of CMA No.402/2024 (Stay). 4. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 6th February 2024 Mr. M. Kamran Iqbal Bhutta, Advocate for Petitioner. -*-*-*-*-*- Learned counsel for the petitioner seeks urgency, however, under instructions submits that petitioner does not want to press instant petition, as purpose of filing instant petition has been served out. Urgency granted. Be that as it may, instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
